adams-beef-stroganoff.name: Adam’s Beef Stroganoff

ingredients.item: Chopped fresh parsley and fresh chives

instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add mushrooms and thyme, season with salt and pepper, and cook, tossing often, until mushrooms are golden brown and tender, 10–12 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl.
Increase heat to high and heat 2 Tbsp. oil in same skillet. Cook beef, tossing often, until browned on all sides, 5–8 minutes. Transfer to bowl with mushroom mixture.

Reduce heat to medium-high, add remaining 2 Tbsp. oil to skillet, and cook onion and garlic, stirring occasionally, until golden and softened, 8–10 minutes. Add broth and cream, bring to a simmer, and cook until reduced by half, 20–25 minutes. Whisk in sour cream, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard; season with salt and pepper. Simmer until sauce is thick and creamy, 8–10 minutes. Add mushrooms and beef with any accumulated juices and cook, stirring occasionally, until just heated through.

Meanwhile, cook egg noodles in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain and transfer to a large bowl. Add butter and a large pinch of parsley and a large pinch of chives; toss until butter is melted.
Arrange noodles on a large platter and spoon stroganoff over top. Garnish with additional parsley and chives.

adobo-mushroom-tacos.name: Adobo Mushroom Tacos

ingredients.item: . coconut sugar or organic cane sugar
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: salsa, store-bought vegan sour cream (optional), sliced radishes, halved cherry tomatoes, chopped cilantro, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 400°. Toss mushrooms, oil, lime juice, oregano, onion powder, garlic powder, cumin, coconut sugar, salt, and cayenne in a medium bowl until mushrooms are well coated. Spread mushrooms out in a single layer on a parchment-lined baking sheet and roast until golden brown and crisp, 20–25 minutes.
Build tacos with tortillas, mushrooms, salsa, vegan sour cream (if using), radishes, tomatoes, and cilantro. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

aebleskiver-recipe-lezzet.name: Aebleskiver Recipe

ingredients.item: You can use full wheat flour or gl&uuml instead of white flour.
You can change a fraction of a lighter tissue internal with oats.
Milk, milk or peel milk can be preferred.
Milk place you can achieve a mild sour and soft texture by adding yogurt.
You can use olive oil or coconut oil instead of crushed butter.
A lighter version can reduce the amount of to fat.
Powder sugar instead of brunette sugar, honey or akç beerkil can be used.
The sugar is completely possible; inner mortar fruit or jam provide meals.
Traditionally jam fruit, frecolate or available.
A aloe alternative to fresh parts or sugar-free tael cream can be preferred.
A little more carbonate + acidic material (cold or lemon juice) can be used instead of baking powder.
It can reduce the amount of baking powder and improve the number of eggs.

instructions: 1. Mix flour, powder sugar, baking powder, carbonate and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add the egg eggs, milk, melted butter and vanilla.
3. Mix with dry materials, smooth get a dough.
4. Pay attention to mixing the dough more.
5. Heat the Aebleskiver pan in medium fire and grease each eye with a small amount of butter.
6. pour 1 min of dough.
7. If you wish, you can put small piece jam, chocolate or fruit.
8. Turn the balls and other sides with the help of the balls.
9. All balls cook up to gold color area.
10. Serve hot; u powdered sugar sprinkler or maple service with nuts.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

aegean-herbs-salad-with-olive-oil-lezzet.name: Aegean Herbs Salad With Olive Oil
instructions: 1. You are here: Done;n.
2. Separate the leaves of the thyme and fine shore.
3. Extract the thick stems of Maydanoz and dereot and fine shore.
4. All greenery get deep rough.
5. Olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper in a separate container thoroughly shring.
6. Discover and blend the greens of the sauce.
7. Serve.

air-fryer-2-ingredient-dough-ham-and-che.name: Air Fryer 2-ingredient Dough Ham And Cheese Hot Pockets
instructions: Combine flour and Greek yogurt in a large bowl. Dough will be crumble. Transfer to a lightly floured work surface and mix until it forms a ball. Knead until smooth, adding more flour as necessary to keep dough from sticking, about 3 minutes.
Divide dough into 4 equal pieces, and roll out each piece into a 4x7-inch rectangle about 4 1/8-inch thick.

Spread dough pieces with Dijon mustard and evenly top with Swiss cheese followed by ham slices, folded to fit. Pull up the long sides of the dough until they meet, and then pinch and seal. Tuck the ends under on the bottom, pinching and closing up dough pockets. Whisk together egg and water in a small bowl and brush egg wash onto the dough pockets.
Preheat the air fryer to 182°C (180 degrees C) for 3 minutes. Lightly coat the air basket with cooking spray or line with a parchment liner.
Place dough pockets in the basket seam side down, being sure they're not touching.

Cook until golden brown, 9 to 10 minutes. You may have to work in batches depending on the size and brand of your air fryer. Transfer hot pockets to a wire rack, cool for 3 to 5 minutes, and serve hot.

air-fryer-baked-potatoes.name: Air Fryer Baked Potatoes

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Rub potatoes with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and parsley. Place potatoes in the air fryer basket.
Cook in the preheated air fryer until potatoes are soft, 40 to 50 minutes, depending on potato size.
Slice potatoes lengthwise. Pinch both sides of each potato, using your hands and forcing potatoes to open, until the fluffy insides start to come out. Add 1 tablespoon of butter into each potato.

air-fryer-boursin-stuffed-wontons.name: Air Fryer Boursin-stuffed Wontons
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 163°C (160 degrees C).

Separate the wonton wrappers and place on a clean work surface. Place 1 teaspoon of garlic and herb cheese in the center of each wonton. Use a pastry brush or your finger to wet the edges of each wonton and fold in half, pressing lightly to ensure a proper seal. Moisten the tips of the wrapper and press together. Set on a clean plate and generously spray with cooking spray.
Spray the inner basket with cooking spray and place 1/2 of the stuffed wontons into the basket.
Air fry until lightly browned, for 4 minutes. Repeat with remaining wontons. Allow to cool slightly before eating.

air-fryer-salmon-for-one.name: Air Fryer Salmon For One
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 188°C (190 degrees C) for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, season salmon fillet with salt, Greek seasoning, pepper, and dill.
Line the air fryer basket with a perforated parchment round. Place salmon onto the parchment, skin-side down.
Cook salmon in the preheated air fryer until fish flakes easily with a fork, about 15 minutes.

air-fryer-sweet-potato-hash.name: Air Fryer Sweet Potato Hash
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Toss sweet potato, bacon, olive oil, paprika, salt, pepper, and dill in a large bowl. Place mixture into the preheated air fryer. Cook for 12 to 16 minutes. Check and stir after 10 minutes and then every 3 minutes until crispy and browned.

aliada-argiro.name: Aliada
instructions: For the apiada we keep small pieces of the gliding code to give flavor.
Place the fish pieces in a pot and add complexity of water.
Allow to boil, lower the heat and simmer for 20 minutes for the fish to remove all its flavor.
We drag the broth and keep it sideways.
Clean the potatoes, cut them into pieces and bottle them in a pot until softened for about 20 minutes.
Drain them very well and mash them with the potato press.
Melt garlic cages with olive oil in the blender and add them to the pumped potatoes.
Mix with the seed to homogenize.
Add lemon juice to make the fish as acidic as we wish.
Finally, starring, add the fish broth a little bit until the fish is homogenized.
We grandly pour the broth so it doesn't become too fluid.
In the end we check if salt is needed because the broth is usually salty.

almond-croissant-galette.name: Almond Croissant Galette

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 1⅔ cups (208 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. baking powder in a large bowl to combine. Add 2 oz. chilled cream cheese, cut into 1" pieces, and rub into dry ingredients with your fingers until incorporated (mixture will look very shaggy). Add 10 Tbsp. (1¼ sticks) chilled unsalted butter, sliced ½" thick, and toss to coat in mixture, then smash into smaller, flatter pieces (about dime-size).
Make a well in the center and pour in ¼ cup ice water. Toss mixture with a fork or your hands to distribute, then knead in bowl a couple times to bring dough together (some dry bits may remain).

Turn out dough onto a surface lightly dusted with rice flour or all-purpose flour; dust top of dough with flour. Roll out to a ½"-thick rectangle. Fold dough in half, rotate 90°, and fold in half again. Roll out again to a ½"-thick rectangle and repeat folding process, dusting with more flour as needed to prevent sticking. Pat into a ½"-thick disk and wrap tightly in plastic. Chill at least 2 hours (preferably at least 12 hours if you have the time).
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled, or transfer to a resealable plastic freezer bag and freeze up to 3 months. Thaw overnight in refrigerator before rolling out.

Place a rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 375°. Vigorously whisk ½ cup (100 g) granulated sugar, ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, 2 Tbsp. dark rum, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. vanilla extract, and ¼ tsp. almond extract in a medium bowl until smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. Add 1 large egg and 1 cup (100 g) almond flour; whisk until combined and fluffy, about 1 minute. (Alternatively, you can use a hand mixer to make frangipane instead of a whisk.)

Let dough sit at room temperature 5 minutes. Unwrap and roll out on a surface lightly floured with rice flour or all-purpose flour to a 12" round about ⅛" thick. Brush excess flour from dough and transfer to a 10"–12"-diameter ovenproof skillet. Lift edges so dough comes up sides of skillet.

Scrape frangipane into center of dough. Using a small offset spatula or a spoon, smooth surface, pushing to edges of skillet. Sprinkle generously with flaked almonds and press gently to adhere. Fold edges of dough up and over filling, pleating as needed and being careful not to tear (pinch to seal if needed).

Bake galette until crust is deep golden brown, 40–50 minutes. Let cool in skillet at least 20 minutes. Lightly dust frangipane with powdered sugar (avoid pastry) just before serving.
Do Ahead: Galette can be baked 1 day ahead. Let cool completely; store, loosely covered, at room temperature.

almond-banana-smoothies.name: Almond-banana Smoothies
instructions: Blend first 5 ingredients in blender until smooth. Divide smoothies among 4 small glasses. Sprinkle lightly with nutmeg.

ancho-mole-cookies.name: Ancho Mole Cookies

ingredients.item: (185 g; or more) raw sesame seeds

ingredients.prep: not ancho chile powder, which has added salt, cumin, and other spices)

ingredients.item: . vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste

ingredients.prep: mango, or pineapple), cut into  0.75" pieces

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Toast nuts and ¼ cup sesame seeds on a rimmed baking sheet on upper rack, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool.

Stir together ancho powder and agave syrup in a small bowl. Whisk flour, baking powder, and cinnamon in a medium bowl to combine. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter, sugar, and salt in a large bowl, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl as needed, until light and creamy, about 3 minutes. Add egg yolks and vanilla and beat until incorporated, about 1 minute. Scrape in ancho mixture and beat until smooth and creamy, about 1 minute. Reduce speed to low, add dry ingredients, and beat to combine. Add dried fruit, chocolate, and toasted nuts and sesame seeds; mix with a wooden spoon until evenly distributed.

Divide dough in half. Working one at a time, roll each piece into a 10"-long log. Wrap each log tightly in plastic and roll across work surface to make as smooth and cylindrical as possible. Place on a rimmed baking sheet and freeze until surface is firm, about 20 minutes.

Slap a log down onto counter to create a flat side; roll over and slap again to flatten another side (you’re aiming for a triangular shape). Repeat to create third side of the triangle. Tap against counter to smooth if needed, then tap ends to flatten. Repeat with second log. Return logs to baking sheet; freeze until firm, about 15 minutes.

Working one at a time, unwrap logs and brush sides with egg white. Working on baking sheet, sprinkle sides with remaining 1 cup sesame seeds and gently press to coat. Surface should be covered; use more sesame if needed. Freeze logs on baking sheet, uncovered, until surface is very firm but not frozen solid, about 1 hour.

Preheat oven to 350°. Slice a log crosswise into ¼"-thick triangles and divide cookies between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 1" apart. (If dough is soft or starts to lose its shape, freeze 10 minutes before continuing.) Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and back to front halfway through, until edges are just set, about 10 minutes. Let cool on baking sheets. Transfer cookies to a platter or airtight container and line baking sheets with fresh sheets of parchment paper. Repeat process with remaining dough.
Do Ahead: Dough can be rolled into logs 3 days ahead; refrigerate. Transfer to freezer 30 minutes before slicing. Cookies can be baked 1 day ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

and-chicken-noodle-soup.name: And Chicken Noodle Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and celery and cook until just tender, about 5 minutes.
Add chicken broth, vegetable broth, chicken, egg noodles, carrots, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.

and-delicious-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: And Delicious Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Cream the butter, dark brown sugar and white sugar in a bowl. Once pale and fluffy, crack the egg in and add vanilla if desired. Sift in your self-raising flour and salt.
Fold in the flour and salt just until you can't see any streaks. Then, fold in chocolate.
Cover the bowl with Saran wrap and rest in the fridge for at least an hour or up to 2 days at most. (If freezing dough, dough can be frozen for upto 2 months).
Preheat the oven to 191°C.
Scoop the dough into tablespoon-sized balls and place onto a baking tray with 2-inch spaces in between the cookies..
Bake for 7 minutes for a chewy cookie, or 10 minutes for a crispy cookie.
Let cool and serve, or enjoy warm with a glass of cold milk.
Enjoy!

antipasto-focaccia-sandwich.name: Antipasto Focaccia Sandwich
instructions: In a liquid measuring cup, whisk together the water, sugar, and yeast. Let sit for 5 minutes, until foamy.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour and kosher salt. Pour in the yeast mixture and mix with a wooden spoon until a shaggy, wet dough forms.

Add ¼ cup of the olive oil to a separate large bowl, rubbing with your fingers to coat the inside evenly. Transfer the dough to the oiled bowl, flipping the dough to coat with oil all over. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight, or let rest at room temperature for 5 hours, until doubled in size.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).

Coat a 9 x 13-inch baking dish with the remaining ¼ cup olive oil. Turn the proofed dough onto the baking pan and press with your fingertips to stretch all the way to the edges of the pan. Sprinkle the dough with the Perfect Pinch® Italian Seasoning.
Bake the focaccia for 30–35 minutes, or until golden brown on top. Remove from the oven, sprinkle with flaky salt, and allow to cool for 30 minutes.
Assemble the sandwiches: Cut the slab of focaccia into 6 squares, then slice each square in half horizontally to open.
In a small bowl, mix together the mayonnaise and McCormick® Perfect Pinch® Italian Seasoning.

Spread the seasoned mayonnaise on both sides of each piece of focaccia. Top one side of each sandwich with turkey, spicy salami, prosciutto, mozzarella, roasted red bell peppers, arugula, and a drizzle of balsamic glaze, then close the sandwiches with the remaining focaccia. Slice in half diagonally and serve.
Enjoy!

anything-goes-green-goddess-salad.name: Anything-goes Green Goddess Salad

ingredients.prep: parsely, cilantro, basil, mint, tarragon, and/or chives
sour cream, buttermilk, crème fraîche, or labneh (Lebanese strained yogurt)
boneless chicken breasts (about 1 lb.), one 15-oz. can chickpeas, 8 boiled eggs, or three 5-oz. cans oil-packed tuna

instructions: Combine 3 (heaping) cups tender herbs (such as dill, parsely, cilantro, basil, mint, tarragon, and/or chives), ½ cup mayonnaise,  ½ cup plain whole-milk yogurt (or sour cream, buttermilk, crème fraîche, or labneh), 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 1 Tbsp. drained capers, 1 garlic clove, and a big pinch of kosher salt in a blender.

Finely grate zest of 1 lemon into blender. Cut lemon in half and squeeze in juice through your hand or a fine-mesh sieve to catch the seeds. Blend on high until bright green, and speckled with small pieces of herbs. Taste dressing and season with freshly ground black pepper and more salt as needed.

If using 2 chilled cooked medium skinless, boneless chicken breasts (about 1 lb.), slice against the grain 1" thick. Tear each slice into bite-size pieces. If using one 15-oz. can chickpeas, drain and rinse well. If using 8 boiled eggs, peel and cut into bite-size pieces. If using three 5-oz. cans oil-packed tuna, drain and flake with a fork into bite-size pieces. Place protein of choice in a medium bowl.
Add ¼ cup dressing to protein and mix well to combine. Place remaining dressing in a small bowl and set aside for serving.
Remove any leaves attached to 2 celery stalks. Thinly slice stalks on a diagonal and mix into salad. Season with salt and pepper. Top with any celery leaves.
Cut 1 ripe avocado in half. Remove pit, scoop flesh out of skin, and cut into ½"-thick wedges.
Separate leaves of 1 head Bibb, butter, romaine, or iceberg lettuce. Wash and dry leaves thoroughly.

To serve, place bowl of salad and reserved dressing on a platter and arrange lettuce, avocado wedges, and a big pile of potato chips around. Slice remaining 1 lemon into wedges. Drizzle a bit of juice over avocado. Arrange lemon wedges on platter. Season avocado with some salt and a crank or two of pepper.

apple-and-caramel-pie-pequerecetas.name: Apple And Caramel Pie

ingredients.item: 175 g of liquid caramel (bought or homemade)
350 ml Buttermilk (bought at any supermarket, or made by mixing 300 ml of whole milk with 1 / 2 lemon juice and letting rest 10 minutes)
200 g de queso mascarpone o queso crema

instructions: En un cuenco mezclamos la harina, la levadura, el bicarbonato, la canela y la sal.
In another bowl we beat the sugar with the oil, add the purée of apples, the caramel, the essence of vanilla and pounding to mix. We add eggs 1 at a time, beating after each addition.
We added 1 / 3 of the dry ingredients into the moist bowl and we incorporated half of the buttercream and we smoothed up to fully integrate.
We added the rest of the ingredients and bawked back to integrate. We added the apple to dice.

Let's put the mixture into a frying mold with an oven paper and bake in an oven that's pressurized at 180 ″ 3 ″ for about 50-55 minutes, till as we tap into the centre with a stick it's about clear (it'll have some moisture because the biscuit's juicy). We let stand at the mold for 10 minutes, we clear and let completely cool into a grid

To make the pilling, we beat the mascarpona cheese with candy and glass sugar till the cream gets a little high. Go and have some more sugar or candy if you like more sweet. To make our cuts of our biscuit look good, we have to put them to the freezer for 15 minutes and after this time we can cut them and complete them.
The cake remains even more rich if you have them in the refrigerator till they have consumed them.

apple-bar-lezzet.name: Apple Bar
instructions: 1. Peel the shells of apples and mix it with lemon juice in the form of cube.
2. 28x18 cm thick caliper oil paper cool.
3. Set oven to 180 degrees.
4. Softened butter in room heat, powder sugar and vanilla with mixer.
5. Add and mix single eggs.
6.  Unu eleyerek ekleyin.
7. Add apples and publish mixture caliba.
8. Mix all ingredients for over and sprinkle on the dough in the form of crumbs.
9. Bake about 40-45 minutes until the oven is fraught.
10. Serve by slitting.

apple-cheddar-pie.name: Apple Cheddar Pie

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tbsp. (1 0.75 sticks) chilled unsalted butter
Granny smith or other sweet-tart firm baking apples (about 7)

instructions: Pulse flour, granulated sugar, and salt in a food processor to combine. Add cheese and butter and process until pea-size pieces of butter remain, about 15 seconds. Transfer to a large bowl. Drizzle whiskey and ¼ cup ice water over. Using a fork, mix thoroughly until larger clumps form and dough stays together when pressed with your fingertips. Using your hands, knead dough until no dry spots remain (you may need to add 1–2 Tbsp. ice water if dough is too dry). Do not overwork!
Divide dough in half. Press into 2 disks about 1" thick. Smooth out any cracks around perimeter of disks, then wrap tightly in plastic wrap. Chill at least 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 5 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Place apples, brown sugar, whiskey, lemon zest and juice, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and salt in a large resealable plastic bag. Seal and toss to evenly coat. Let chill at least 1 hour or up to overnight, tossing bag occasionally to make sure apples are evenly coated in liquid.
Preheat oven to 400°. Cook butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring often, until it foams, then browns, 3–4 minutes.
Transfer apple mixture along with juices to a large bowl. Add brown butter and cornstarch and toss to coat.

Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Let dough sit at room temperature 5 minutes, then roll out 1 disk on a lightly floured surface to a 12" round. Carefully transfer round to pie dish. Lift up edges and allow dough to slump down into dish, then press dough firmly against sides and bottom of dish. Trim, leaving about a ½" overhang.

Beat egg with 1 tsp. water in a small bowl and brush around edge of dough. Chill while you roll out remaining disk of dough to a 12" round. Carefully transfer to prepared baking sheet and chill until ready to use.

Arrange apple mixture in pie dish, creating rough concentric circles and nestling together so there aren’t gaps. (Don’t go too crazy here, but nestle them in enough so that they’re tightly packed—a lot of extra space can lead to a sunken top crust.) Pour any remaining juices from apple mixture over.

Place second round over filling. Trim edges of top round, leaving a 1" overhang. Fold edge of top round up under bottom edge; press together to seal. Crimp edge and brush whole top with remaining egg wash. Sprinkle with demerara sugar. Cut a few 3" slits in top to let steam escape. Place pie dish on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet and chill 20 minutes.

Bake pie until crust is beginning to take on color, 15–20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and continue to bake, tenting with foil if crust is getting too dark, until crust is deep golden brown and juices are thick and bubbling, 85-100 minutes longer. Note: It is difficult to overbake this pie. Make sure the juices are really bubbling and the bottom crust is well browned. That’s key for a crisp crust and a well-set filling. If you take the pie out too soon, you could have underdone apples and a soggy bottom!
Transfer pie to a wire rack and let cool at least 4 hours before serving. Serve with cheese slices alongside.
Do Ahead: Pie can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; store covered with foil at room temperature.

artichoke-and-salmon-salad.name: Artichoke And Salmon Salad
instructions: Mix cream cheese, parsley, lemon, and Greek seasoning together in a bowl; fold in salmon and artichoke hearts.

arugula-and-cheese-pizza-lezzet.name: Arugula And Cheese Pizza
instructions: 1. Transfer water from a large container.
2. Mix the yeast, powder sugar and salt on it.
3. Add the flour and mix with the wooden spoon and knead it.
4. Take the pit glass coarse dough that you lubricate with olive oil and leave it to leave 1 hour at room temperature with moist clean cloth.
5. To get the air inside the dough, cut the dough with your tube for 5 minutes and open the flour with the roller on the bench you sprinkle.
6. Place the dough into the oven tray or pizza tray with oily paper series.
7. The necessary materials for sauce are mixed in a container and published on the dough.
8. Red onions, peppers and mushrooms sprinkle with fine turp dough.
9. Cook the corns and olives in the oven with a pre-heated 180 degrees.
10. Take a fine sliced parmesan cheese and roka with the oven.

aunt-louises-baked-kibbeh.name: Aunt Louise's Baked Kibbeh
instructions: Place bulgur into a large bowl and cover with boiling water. Let stand until water is absorbed, about 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Stir 1/4 cup onion, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt, basil, and pepper into softened bulgur. Add ground beef and 1/2 pound lamb; mix well. Divide mixture into two portions. Pat one portion over the bottom of a 12x7-inch baking dish.
Place remaining portion onto waxed paper and pat into 12x7-inch rectangle on a piece of waxed paper; set aside.

Cook and stir remaining 1/4 cup onion and 1/2 pound lamb in a skillet until browned, about 5 minutes. Drain excess grease from the skillet. Stir in pine nuts and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt. Spoon over meat layer in the baking dish.

Invert the second meat layer over the filling; peel off and discard waxed paper. Score the top layer into diamond shapes by cutting diagonally in both directions, leaving about 3 inches between the cuts. Press a small dab of butter into the middle of each diamond.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 40 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 71°C (71 degrees C). Garnish with cherry tomatoes and mint.

aurora-eggs-recipe-step-by-step-comedera.name: Aurora Eggs Receives step by step
aurora-eggs-recipe-step-by-step-comedera.original_name: Receta de huevos aurora paso a paso
instructions: Put his balls into a pot with water. Put them to a boil about 15 minutes till they come back.
After that time, get them out of the water and let them get cold.
Take the tomatoes and wash them and cut them into cubes.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and saltilate the tomatoes with salt and pepper at best for 5 minutes till sealed. Turn and put them out.
In a bowl, pour half a cup of milk cream and 50 grams of mozzarella decorated cheese. It also incorporates salted tomatoes.
When the eggs are cold, remove the skin and cut into half.
Withdraw the yolk and add to the bowl next to the cut parsley. Mix all ingredients till a cream forms.
Loat the half of clear baked and filled with yolk cream, tomatoes, cheese and milk cream.
Once filled up, put the eggs onto a plate and pour the rest of milk cream, scatter the remaining mozzarella cheese.
Bake the eggs for 25 minutes or till they are greamed and ready.
Retract from the oven and let them stand.
He serves his best and likes his best.

autumn-sweet-potato-shepherds-pie.name: Autumn Sweet Potato Shepherd's Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Cook ground turkey until browned, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium. Stir in onion, bell pepper, garlic, salt, pepper, oregano, cumin, ancho chile powder, and cinnamon. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onion and peppers have softened, about 5 minutes. Stir in tomatoes and pumpkin. Top with mashed sweet potatoes and sprinkle with smoked paprika.
Bake in the preheated oven until flavors are well combined and sweet potatoes are browned, about 30 minutes.

azorean-style-chicken-teleculinaria.name: Azorean-style Chicken
instructions: Beat the chicken breasts with a kitchen hammer, season them with salt and pepper and praise them on both sides in a frying pan with butter. Add the mustard, wrap and remove for a plate.
Add the port wine and cream, stir well, then add the pineapple slices and finally the chicken breaks. Involve, remove from the fire and book hot.
Peel the cars, cut them into thin sticks and fry them in hot oil. Remove, pour on absorbent paper and serve with chicken and white rice.

alheira-in-the-air-fryer-teleculinaria.name: Squirrel In The Air Fryer
instructions: Cut the cabbage into pieces and cook it between 7 and 10 minutes in salted water. Drain and reserve. Light a pot with the oil and cruded garlic, add the crumb of the spread spread and let it shine.
Add the cabbage, season with salt and pepper and let cook for about 5 minutes.
Use anti-adherent vegetable paper and line so that you have the sides covered with vegetable paper.
Place the previous preparation, in air fryer, pinch the dark circles and dispose above
Set at 180 Remove and serve immediately.
